changes: IronClaw shipped 0.26.0 on 2026-04-21 06:32 UTC, giving the security-first lane a fresh Tier 1 release signal.
Hermes Agent rose to roughly 106.4k stars in the 2026-04-21 scan, extending its breakout momentum without a newer release than v2026.4.16.
PicoClaw published a new nightly build at 2026-04-21 01:02 UTC, while SwarmClaw also pushed v1.5.67 and the rest of the watched set mostly showed routine growth and activity.
whyItMatters: This is more than a maintenance day because a Tier 1 security-first project shipped a fresh release.
Hermes remains the standout momentum story in the adjacent benchmark lane, but today's movement still strengthens the existing read rather than changing it.
Lightweight and orchestration branches remain active, yet today's movement does not change the taxonomy or strategic map.
